title: Turtle Soup

propositions.label: The soup the man had previously drunk as turtle soup was not actually turtle soup

statement: A man entered a restaurant and ordered turtle soup. After taking one sip, he asked the waiter, 'Is this really turtle soup?' The waiter replied, 'Yes, it is absolutely turtle soup.' That night, the man killed himself. Why?
truth: The man was a sailor who had once been shipwrecked with his companions, and they ran out of food. One of his companions died, and the surviving companions fed the man soup, telling him it was turtle soup. In reality, it was soup made from the dead companion's flesh. When the man drank real turtle soup at the restaurant, he noticed the taste was different, realized the true nature of what he had been fed back then, and killed himself in despair.
